title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Croma - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Croma - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Croma. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Noida-based team.

About Croma:
Croma is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Croma!
